pr.title: Non-record: Learning Adapters on Random Linear Maps (val_bpb 2.2017)

output.summary: Freezes all transformer weight matrices as random orthogonal maps and trains only diagonal scale+shift adapters to probe random projection structure.
techniques: Frozen random orthogonal projections for Q/K/V/proj/MLP layers
Train only diagonal scale and shift adapters (~0.5% of params)
Measures how much language structure emerges from random maps plus element-wise tweaks
